x-enumeration-literals.name: Initial Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The first risk evaluation conducted when a customer applies for credit.

Comment 
Examples
A new mortgage application is evaluated before approval.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Periodic Review
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A scheduled risk review conducted regularly during the life of a credit facility.

Comment:
Example
Bank reviews borrower risk every year.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reassessment
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A new evaluation performed when significant changes occur.

Comment:
Example
Customer requests a higher loan limit.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Porfolio Review
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Risk assessment performed on a group of loans in the bank's credit portfolio.

Comment:
Bank reviews all SME loans for risk exposure.
